name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient collections causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable management instead of manual tracking of invoices and collections.
problem_solved: inefficient collections process leading to cash flow gaps

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient collections process leading to cash flow gaps
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient collections causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable management instead of manual tracking of invoices and collections.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of invoices and collections

one_liner: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient collections causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable management instead of manual tracking of invoices and collections.
